notes: The generic parity request strictly compares the safe unknown-id cancellation branch. The multi-step billing/access/delegated-token lifecycle is additionally enforced by runtime tests because replaying real billing approval, uninstall, access-scope revocation, or delegated-token side effects against Shopify is not safe without an explicitly disposable app/store credential. The fixture documents precise live-capture blockers while runtime tests enforce strict local payloads, downstream reads, meta logs/state, no upstream passthrough, and secret handling for every operationName.
